level_signals: Title is 'Manager' but no direct reports mentioned
Opportunity to grow into leadership of broader RevOps function described as future potential
Expected to act as strategic partner to GTM leaders

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven Experience. in GTM Operations roles and partnering with GTM leaders.
Sales & Customer Success . A deep knowledge of sales and customer success principles to align efforts towards revenue goals.
Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills. The ability to analyze complex data sets, identify trends, and draw actionable insights for continuous optimization.
Technical Expertise. Proficiency in CRM systems, QPQ, data analytics, and other relevant tools to enhance productivity.
Communication & Leadership. Strong communication skills to convey strategies clearly across teams and stakeholders for effective collaboration.
Strategic Thinking. Future-oriented mindset to anticipate decisions' impact on the organization and drive revenue growth initiatives.
High level of Motivation & Delivery-Focus. You're ambitious. Nothing feels better than getting sh*t done.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: ClayZoomInfo, or similar data enrichment providers

scope.surface: Full GTM stack — systems, processes, and data across Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Finance
primary_metrics_inferred: Data integrity and cleanliness across GTM tools
Reduction in manual/repetitive GTM work via automation
Revenue dashboard accuracy and adoption by leadership
core_responsibilities: Optimize GTM Processes. This involves streamlining the customer lifecycle, and improving sales processes
Drive Efficiency Through Automation and Technology. Evaluating and implementing tools and systems to streamline processes, reduce manual work, and enhance productivity
Ensure Data Integrity. Overseeing data administration, implementing data governance policies, conducting regular audits, and resolving discrepancies to ensure data accuracy
Collaborate Across Teams. Working with sales, marketing, customer success, finance, and other teams to centralize information, share insights, and bridge operations

green_flags: Clear success criteria defined with specific tool names (HubSpot, Outreach, Nooks)
Explicit growth path described — opportunity to lead broader RevOps function as Klue scales
ESOP available to all full-time employees
Hybrid schedule is well-defined (Mon/Wed/Thu in office)
Culture of AI-first tooling and autonomy is emphasized
Company explicitly encourages candidates who don't tick every box
